description: F2/E4 independence (hermetic): pinning a conversation must SURVIVE clearing its message history — l3_clear_history clears messages but must NOT unpin (only deleteConversation unpins). Pin the echo-peer conv, send a message, clear history, then a wait_for step asserts the conv is STILL pinned (throws if clear wrongly unpinned it), then unpin (self-clean). Final assertions: the pin set is restored (unpinned) and the history is empty. Hermetic — local Prefs + history state, no echo round-trip (the send persists locally). Maps to F2 + E4.
